description: Initial schema - files and embeddings tables
up: CREATE TABLE files (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, mime_type TEXT, size_bytes INTEGER, hash TEXT UNIQUE, path TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
CREATE TABLE embeddings (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, file_id TEXT REFERENCES files(id), chunk_index INTEGER, vector BLOB, model TEXT, dimensions INTEGER)
CREATE TABLE tags (file_id TEXT REFERENCES files(id), tag TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (file_id, tag))
